summary: iter213 EchoWaste v1.2 Phase 1 testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI renders correctly with all required elements. One minor frontend issue: buffet-close button is disabled when no session, preventing the flash message from appearing (onClick never fires on disabled button).

ui_bugs.issue: Button is disabled when no session, so onClick handler never fires and flash message 'Start a buffet set first' never appears. The disabled attribute prevents the click event entirely.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Either remove disabled attribute and handle the no-session case in onClick, OR show the message via a different mechanism (e.g., tooltip on hover)

action_items: Fix mode-buffet-close button to show flash message when clicked without session (currently disabled prevents onClick)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features work, minor buffet-close flash issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test captures, entries, buffet sessions, zones, and ground-truth records during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter213 v1.2 Phase 1 features all working: (1) Feature flags - all 5 new flags present and enabled; (2) Multi-zone capture - zones array with auto-generated names working; (3) Buffet set/close - session creation, forecast from calendar_events, cost rollup working; (4) Cost-per-cover - guest count updates cost_per_cover fields; (5) Zone CRUD - append/list zones working; (6) Recipe suggestions - list/approve/reject endpoints working; (7) Review pending - returns entries with needs_review; (8) Ground-truth labelled - stores and lists records; (9) Idempotency - same client_id returns idempotent_replay:true. Frontend: waste-standalone-root, waste-tab-root, mode selector (4 tiles), primary CTA, online pill, zone input all render correctly. Ground-truth mode hides zone input as expected.

backend_feature_flags.details: GET /api/waste/feature-flags returns all 5 iter213 flags (buffet_pre_cost, cost_per_cover, multi_zone_capture, collect_ground_truth, recipe_suggestions) = True

backend_capture_still_cost_breakdown.details: POST /api/waste/capture/still returns entry with cost_breakdown keyed by {protein,pastry,produce,beverages,dairy,sundries}, items have category and needs_review fields

backend_multi_zone_capture.details: POST /api/waste/capture/still with zones returns zone_count=3, zones array with user-named and auto-generated names matching pattern UNK-UNK-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-03

backend_buffet_set.details: POST /api/waste/buffet/set creates session with forecast from calendar_events (group_block_covers=0 when no events), set_cost_usd, set_cost_breakdown, estimated_covers_at_setup

backend_buffet_guest_count.details: POST /api/waste/buffet/{session_id}/guest-count updates session with guest_count, recomputes cost_per_cover_consumed_usd, cost_per_cover_wasted_usd, cost_per_cover_total_usd, waste_pct

backend_buffet_close.details: POST /api/waste/buffet/close sets status='closed', rolls up close_cost_usd + waste_pct

backend_zone_crud.details: POST /api/waste/entries/{entry_id}/zones appends zone, runs vision stub, updates parent entry total_cost + zone_count. GET lists zones.

backend_recipe_suggestions.details: GET /api/waste/recipes/suggested returns suggestions array. POST approve/reject returns 404 on unknown recipe_id.

backend_review_pending.details: GET /api/waste/review/pending returns entries with needs_review or pending suggestions, plus pending_suggestions count

backend_ground_truth_labelled.details: POST /api/waste/training/labelled stores ground_truth record and returns ground_truth_id. GET lists records. Works without requiring image media.

backend_idempotency.details: Same client_id on /capture/still returns idempotent_replay:true with same entry_id

frontend_waste_standalone.details: Navigate to /m/waste - waste-standalone-root and waste-tab-root both render

frontend_mode_selector.details: Mode selector has 4 tiles (mode-still, mode-buffet-set, mode-buffet-close, mode-ground-truth)

frontend_primary_cta.details: waste-capture-primary CTA visible, label changes to 'Upload labelled sample' in ground_truth mode

frontend_buffet_close_flash.details: Clicking mode-buffet-close when no session does NOT show flash message because button is disabled (disabled attribute prevents onClick)

frontend_zone_input.details: waste-zone-name-input accepts text, waste-add-zone-btn renders. Both hidden in ground_truth mode as expected.

frontend_online_pill.details: waste-online-pill shows '● ONLINE' in normal network. Queue count not shown when queue is 0.

frontend_suggestions_banner.details: waste-suggestions-banner not rendered when no pending suggestions (correct behavior)

frontend_review_pill.details: waste-review-pill not rendered when no pending-review items (correct behavior)
